Case# vmnet_return_t.VMNET_PACKET_TOO_BIG

Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.10+

```
case VMNET_PACKET_TOO_BIG
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/vmnet/vmnet_return_t/vmnet_packet_too_big#Discussion)

Indicates failure due to packet size exceeding the maximum transmission unit (MTU).
